{{Infobox concept
| name = Iron
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Iron Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Iron refers to a significant stage of advancement within the [[Foundation]] realm, following the [[Copper]] rank. Achieving an [[Iron body]] provides a quantitative leap in power, granting practitioners superhuman capabilities that far exceed those of [[Copper]]-level souls. This stage is characterized by a more solid and bright core, as well as a physical body that is significantly tougher than leather. While an Iron practitioner still requires food and sleep, they gain increased durability against physical injury and can often resist bleeding to death. However, the transformation into an [[Iron body]] is a grueling process that involves expelling impurities from the body through various means, such as black blood and tears. There are several distinct types of Iron bodies that practitioners can cultivate. The [[Steelborn body]] is highly regarded for providing immense brute strength, particularly once a practitioner reaches the [[Underlord]] stage. The [[Bloodforged Iron body]] is specifically designed to resist corrosive breakdown, though it consumes [[madra]] very rapidly. The [[Moonheart Iron body]] is unique because it separates a person's consciousness from their physical form, allowing them to maintain mental and spiritual control even when the body suffers trauma. Additionally, the [[Silverscale Iron body]] is commonly used by fishermen to provide resistance against spiritual attacks. In terms of combat and utility, Iron-quality [[madra]] can power specialized equipment like flying swords, which can levitate and strike with the force of a real blade. While an Iron practitioner is powerful enough to face most threats, they can still be challenged by highly advanced or intelligent [[Remnants]]. The rank is also used as a descriptor for individuals who have reached this level of spiritual and physical development.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Iron]] strength is a level of power [[Kelsa]] needs to fight effectively.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c2">''Unsouled'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Iron]] is a stage of practitioner.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c12">''Unsouled'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Following the [[Copper stage]], Iron serves as a power stage of advancement that can be reached after walking a [[Path]]. To achieve this rank, an individual must push [[madra]] out of their channels and into their flesh to completely reforge the body. This process improves one's vision and strengthens both [[madra]] and physical attributes, though advancing too early risks crippling a [[sacred artist]]'s future. While this stage is lower than [[Jade]], it represents a significant milestone for [[Lindon]], who eventually reaches and holds the rank of Iron.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|At the [[Iron stage]], one's eyes get better and they forge their body.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2">''Soulsmith'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Iron]] is a stage of advancement following [[Copper]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] is waiting for [[Iron]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c9">''Soulsmith'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Iron]] is a body type or stage.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c11">''Soulsmith'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Iron]] is a stage of advancement related to [[madra]]/body strength.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c12">''Soulsmith'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Iron]] is a stage that can be reached after walking a [[Path]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Iron]] is a physical attribute or state that [[miners]] possess.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14">''Soulsmith'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|To reach [[Iron]], one must push [[madra]] out of the channels and into the flesh.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Iron]] is a stage of advancement lower than [[Jade]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15">''Soulsmith'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Iron]] is a power stage.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Advancing to [[Iron]] completely reforges the body.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16">''Soulsmith'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Advancing to [[Iron]] too early can cripple a [[sacred artist]]'s future.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The transformation to [[Iron]] is a possibility for [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Iron]] is a stage of advancement.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c17">''Soulsmith'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Iron]] is a stage of advancement for [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Iron]] is a rank or stage held by [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19">''Soulsmith'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] is an [[Iron]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c20">''Soulsmith'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|In the progression of power, Iron represents a stage where a practitioner still requires basic sustenance and sleep. This level is characterized by the presence of [[madra]] that possesses an iron quality. While it is said that an Iron child should lack more pride than a mouse, the strength of this stage can be lethal, as evidenced by the death of [[Kral]] at the hands of an Iron boy. The character in question is confirmed to possess this specific type of [[madra]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|An [[Iron]] child should have no more pride than a mouse.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c1">''Blackflame'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Kral]] was killed by a boy who is an [[Iron]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c2">''Blackflame'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|An [[Iron]] is a stage of progression that still needs sleep and food.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5">''Blackflame'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Iron]] is a quality of [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7">''Blackflame'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The character possesses iron.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10">''Blackflame'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Irons]] are a group that stayed behind during the fight.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1">''Wintersteel'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Within the [[Fallen Leaf School]], Iron serves as a specific rank or stage held by certain guards. These individuals utilize foxfire and spears in combat, as the term also denotes a particular level of [[madra]]. The [[Heaven's Glory]] group is composed of a dozen such practitioners. Additionally, Iron functions as a classification or rank for persons within the context of the [[Wei clan]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Iron]] is a rank or stage held by some guards of the [[Fallen Leaf School]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[The Iron]] is a guard that uses spears and foxfire.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11">''Bloodline'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Iron]] is a level of [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Heaven's Glory]] group includes a dozen [[Irons]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12">''Bloodline'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Iron]] is a rank or classification of person in the [[Wei clan]] context.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|“A boy he brought with him. Just an Iron.”<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c2" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|“You're an Iron, not a Remnant; you still need sleep. Food.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
